name: installer-status-check-json
title: Add installer status, check, and JSON modes
description: Add concise read-only installer inspection modes with stable exit semantics and structured output while reusing existing install and audit contracts.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Implemented read-only status/check inspection, schema-v1 JSON, strict receipt validation, audit delegation, 0.16.0 release docs/evidence, and focused regression coverage. Full installer coverage is 100% lines and branches; all seven candidate consumers passed.
